embeds.description:
# ⬇️ DOWNLOAD MANAGERS & TOOLS

> **Read this before downloading FitGirl repacks or any large files.**

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## 🔗 FitGirl FF Link Extractor

A GUI tool that **bypasses Cloudflare Turnstile** and pulls direct FuckingFast download links from FitGirl pages — paste them straight into JDownloader 2 or FDM.

**This fork adds Zen + Chromium browser support.**

**How to use:**
1. Paste a FitGirl repack page URL into the tool.
2. Use checkboxes to **exclude** files you don't need (bonus content, other language packs).
3. Click **Extract Links** — an undetected browser resolves each FuckingFast URL automatically.
4. Click **Copy to Clipboard** → paste directly into JDownloader 2 or FDM.

Download the `.exe` from GitHub Releases, or run from source (see **Build from Source** below).

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## 📥 JDownloader 2

**[Download JDownloader 2](https://jdownloader.org/download/index)** — best for container links and multi-host pages.

**Recommended settings** (Settings → Connection Manager → Default Connection):
- **Max chunks per download:** `2`
- **Max simultaneous downloads:** `4`

**Adding links:** copy all URLs from the extractor → JDownloader auto-detects them from clipboard (bottom-right popup). Right-click the package → **Start Download** — not *Download All*.

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## ⬇️ Free Download Manager (FDM)

**[Download FDM](https://www.freedownloadmanager.org/)** — free, no ads, great for direct HTTP links.

1. Install the FDM desktop app.
2. Install the **browser extension** (Chrome / Firefox / Edge) from the FDM site — it intercepts download links automatically when you click them in-browser, no copy-pasting needed.
3. In FDM: **Options → General** → set max connections per server to `2`, max simultaneous downloads to `4`.

**When to use which:**
- **FDM + extension** — best when you already have direct links, or want one-click browser downloads.
- **JDownloader** — better for container/multi-host pages (filecrypt.cc, `.dlc` files, multi-part archives).

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## ☁️ Cloudflare / FuckingFast Settings

FuckingFast uses Cloudflare to throttle aggressive downloaders. These settings keep you under the radar:

| Setting | Value | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Chunks per file | **2** | 4+ triggers rate-limiting |
| Simultaneous downloads | **4** | Fast but not flagged |
| Retry delay | auto | Don't spam retries |

> Stuck at 0 B/s? **Pause all → wait 30s → resume.** Cloudflare rate-limits reset quickly.
